title: Shadow Chat Update Notes
summary: Shadow Chat now handles rapid production updates without stacking restart prompts.

sections.heading: New
items: Restart prompts now focus on the newest published version.
Older update prompts no longer queue up after the newest version has been handled.
Critical releases can still require a restart when users are running an older build.

sections.heading: Smarter Tracking
items: Shadow Chat records who has seen, dismissed, acknowledged, or restarted for each release.
Update notes do not keep popping up after a user has already read that release.
Release notes are stored outside chat messages so Shado posts are no longer needed for app-update announcements.
